subject: Reference request for Rohan Gonzales for 2027 university applications
body: Dear Mr Adeyemi. I am writing early because I know reference season is chaos. Rohan is planning to apply to engineering programmes for September 2027 entry. Would you be willing to write his physics reference. Happy to sit down with you and Mrs Balogun any afternoon in February to walk through his portfolio. Warmly. Arjun Gonzales.

subject: Rohan university plan overview before Dec 5
body: Priya. Sending the university plan overview so you have it before the December 5 conversation. Rohan is looking at engineering; we are holding Nigeria, UK, US, Canada, and India open. India is in the mix seriously — BITS Pilani and the IITs — which would land him closer to Maa. Would love your read before we sit the family down. Anna.

subject: Re: Abuja Q1 order forecast
body: Funke. Confirming 480 cases feasible for Q1 pending Yemi's final production board Friday. Will send the signed slot commitment via DocuSign by Nov 29. Arjun.

subject: University financial picture — attached with Q4 packet
body: Chief. The university financial picture is enclosed with the Q4 packet. Base and conservative FX cases both modelled. No draw on the brewery line or operating reserves in either case. Happy to walk you through it December 5 morning before the equipment quarterly. Arjun.
